mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (client_order_id, user_id, account_id, stock_code, exchange, side, order_type, order_quantity, price, status, source, currency, requested_at) VALUES (#{clientOrderId}, #{userId}, #{accountId}, #{stockCode}, #{exchange}, #{side}, #{orderType}, #{orderQuantity}, #{price}, #{status}, #{source}, #{currency}, #{requestedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, client_order_id, user_id, account_id, stock_code, exchange, side, order_type, order_quantity, price, status, source, currency, requested_at, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, client_order_id, user_id, account_id, stock_code, exchange, side, order_type, order_quantity, price, status, source, currency, requested_at, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE client_order_id = #{clientOrderId}
